narrative:
Mt. Orab Village has 2,854 registered voters, with 59.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.9 percentage points.
